sql_array: CREATE TABLE soap_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, result VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO soap_test (id, result) VALUES (1, soap_call('example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector('str', 'G')));
UPDATE soap_test SET result = soap_call('example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector('str', 'H')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT result FROM soap_test WHERE id = 1;
